summary: Addresses external review feedback by adding empty-Name validation to RenderPluginConfig (with index in error message) and an AppName doc comment clarification on PipelineSpec. Changes are minimal, correct, and well-tested.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (empty name, empty config section, duplicates, nil inputs, zero-value position)
Error paths tested with specific message assertions
Mutation isolation tests verify no input modification

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (Gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT, table-driven)
Functions are focused and small (single responsibility)
Error messages are descriptive with context (pipeline name, index, middleware name)
SPDX license headers and Feature: CC-0004 tracking present
No dead code or commented-out code

security_checklist.item: No user input from external sources (pure functions operating on Go structs)
No Kubernetes API calls (pure functions only)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Validation is fail-fast (single loop validates all constraints before building pipeline)
Functions return new maps without mutating inputs (except documented in-place mutation)

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty Name validated before ConfigSection check in RenderPluginConfig
Duplicate names, empty fields, and unknown positions all rejected early

defensive_checklist.item: All middleware fields validated (Name, FilterFactory, Position)
BaseFilters entries validated for empty strings

metadata.title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages
